prestazioni: 1UZ-FE 4.0L V8 naturally aspirated engine upgraded with a HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit (850cc injectors, HKS GT2835 turbo-compatible fuel pump, and HKS F-CON V Pro standalone ECU for forced induction management, targeting 450whp on 93 octane)
Full Tomei Powered Exhaust System (2.5-inch stainless steel mandrel-bent piping, 4-2-1 header design with 60mm titanium tips, and a Tomei 3-inch center muffler for optimal scavenging on the 1UZ-FE)

Custom KW Variant 3 coilovers (adjustable compression/rebound damping, 80mm-120mm ride height range, and spherical top mounts for the SC400's unique front strut tower geometry, paired with Cusco front/rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear))
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, custom front bumper with integrated LED turn signals, and rear diffuser with dual exhaust cutouts, retaining OEM pop-up headlights)
Rocket Bunny V1 rear wing (carbon fiber, 1,200mm span, adjustable angle for 1UZ-FE-powered SC400's 55/45 weight distribution) with custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and red pinstriping

Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +22 front / 18x10.5 +30 rear wheels (ET22/ET30 offsets, 5x114.3 PCD) with Toyo R888R 245/40/18 and 275/35/18 tires, paired with DBA 4000 Series rotors and Project Mu HC+ brake pads
